LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ColonyChild.title: colony child
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_FeralChild.title: feral child
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_FeralChild.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was left to survive on {PAWN_gender ? his : her} own after some trauma that {PAWN_gender ? he : she} refuses to talk about. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} learned to appreciate the nature that protected and cared for {PAWN_gender ? him : her}.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_FeralChild2.title: feral child
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_FeralChild2.description: Abandoned by {PAWN_gender ? his : her} parents at an early age, {PAWN_nameDef} was raised by a herd of friendly muffalo. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} cared for the herd, fighting off predators and tending to minor wounds.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_WildChild.title: wild child
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_WildChild.description: {PAWN_nameDef} survived alone in the wilderness for years before being adopted into {PAWN_factionName}. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} missed having company, and became very outgoing after finding {PAWN_gender ? his : her} new family.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_LostChild.title: lost boy
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_LostChild.description: Much of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} early childhood is a mystery, but {PAWN_nameDef} came of age in our colony.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Builder.title: builder
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Builder.description: After {PAWN_gender ? his : her} parents abandoned {PAWN_gender ? him : her}, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} was taken in by pirates and forced to fight. Later {PAWN_gender ? he : she} jonied {PAWN_factionName} and discovered a passion for building, quickly signing up to help renovate {PAWN_gender ? his : her} new home.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildBurnVictim.title: burn victim
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildBurnVictim.description: After being terribly burned as a child, {PAWN_nameDef} developed a life-long fear of fire.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_JuvenileDelinquent.title: juvenile delinquent
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_JuvenileDelinquent.description: {PAWN_nameDef} has a troubled childhood. Frequently on the wrong side of the law, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} spent a lot of time in jail.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_SoleSurvivor.title: sole suvivor
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_SoleSurvivor.description: Left completely alone, {PAWN_nameDef} was forced to fend for {PAWN_gender ? him : her}self at a young age.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_SerialKiller.title: serial killer
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_SerialKiller.description: {PAWN_nameDef} spent {PAWN_gender ? his : her} childhood learning how to take people apart. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} never learned how to put them back together.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_MorbidCuriosity.title: morbid curiosity
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_MorbidCuriosity.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was always fascinated by the dead. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} found any excuse to hang around the battlefield, burying the bodies of raiders after stealing their stuff. {PAWN_gender ? His : Her} peers found this uncomfortable and ostracised {PAWN_gender ? him : her}. As {PAWN_gender ? he : she} grew older, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} increasingly preferred the company of the dead to that of the living.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_BulliedBookworm.title: bullied bookworm
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_BulliedBookworm.description: As a child, {PAWN_nameDef} never fit in with the other kids. Instead, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} spent {PAWN_gender ? his : her} time reading, and occasionally fighting off bullies.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_SurgeryVictim.title: surgery victim
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_SurgeryVictim.description: {PAWN_nameDef} distrusts doctors, as every hospital visit seems to result in a new artificial part - {PAWN_gender ? he : she} would much prefer to stay intact. When not under the knife, {PAWN_nameDef} enjoyed spending time in nature.\n\nAdds trait: Body purist
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Amputee.title: amputee
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Amputee.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was distraught the first time {PAWN_gender ? he : she} had to replace one of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} natural body parts, but soon grew to appreciate the replacement. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} looks forward to getting more replacement parts for the ones {PAWN_gender ? he : she} is still missing.\n\nAdds trait: Transhumanist
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ButcheredButcher.title: butchered butcher
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ButcheredButcher.description: Having been under the knife several times, {PAWN_nameDef} is quite comfortable with butchery of both animals and people.\n\nAdds trait: Psychopath
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_WimpyTranshumanist.title: wimpy transhumanist
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_WimpyTranshumanist.description: {PAWN_nameDef} discovered that each new artificial part reduced {PAWN_gender ? his : her} ability to feel pain. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} made it {PAWN_gender ? his : her} mission to replace as much as possible of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} weak flesh.\n\nAdds trait: Transhumanist
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Transhumanist.title: transhumanist
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Transhumanist.description: {PAWN_nameDef} felt that {PAWN_gender ? his : her} arficial parts were improvements over {PAWN_gender ? his : her} natural flesh.\n\nAdds trait: Transhumanist
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_WarOrphan.title: war orphan
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_WarOrphan.description: After losing both parents, {PAWN_nameDef} was frequently forced to defend {PAWN_gender ? him : her}self. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} withdrew from society, finding solace in art.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TragicNurse.title: tragic nurse
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TragicNurse.description: After the death of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} mother, {PAWN_nameDef} started studying medicine. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} vowed that no other child would suffer the same grief.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TragicNurse2.title: tragic nurse
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TragicNurse2.description: After the death of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} father, {PAWN_nameDef} started studying medicine. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} vowed that no other child would suffer the same grief.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildSoldier.title: child soldier
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildSoldier.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was exposed to the harsh realities of battle at a young age. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} is skilled in combat, but the trauma has stunted {PAWN_gender ? his : her} social skills.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildSniper.title: child sniper
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildSniper.description: {PAWN_nameDef} grew up practicing with all manner of ranged weapons.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildSuperSoldier.title: child supersoldier
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildSuperSoldier.description: {PAWN_nameDef} grew up on the battlefield. All {PAWN_gender ? he : she} knows is combat.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildNurse.title: child nurse
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildNurse.description: {PAWN_nameDef} grew up taking care of the sick and injured.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildDoctor.title: child doctor
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildDoctor.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was a medical prodigy, caring for the sick and injured and even performing surgery at a young age. Having seen so many injuries, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} abhors violence.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Farmhand.title: farmhand
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Farmhand.description: {PAWN_nameDef} grew up helping around the farm, gaining insight into both planting and animal husbandry.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_RanchKid.title: ranch kid
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_RanchKid.description: {PAWN_nameDef} took care of the colony's animals.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_KitchenAid.title: kitchen aid
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_KitchenAid.description: {PAWN_nameDef} helped in the kitchen, chopping vegetables and preparing simple meals for the colony. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} learned how to make delicious meals efficiently while avoiding food poisoning.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildLaborer.title: child laborer
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildLaborer.description: {PAWN_nameDef} worked manual jobs around the colony, carrying materials for construction and crafting equipment.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_BuddingArtist.title: budding artist
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_BuddingArtist.description: {PAWN_nameDef} loved art from a young age, spending hours drawing on the floor and even dabbling in sculpture. However, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} never learned to use {PAWN_gender ? his : her} skills in a practical way.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_SicklyChild.title: sickly child
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_SicklyChild.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was a sickly child. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} spent days on end recuperating in the hospital, where {PAWN_gender ? he : she} befriended all the nurses and picked up some basic medical training.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Gourmand.title: gourmand
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Gourmand.description: {PAWN_nameDef} always had a love for food. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} spent {PAWN_gender ? his : her} spare time hanging around the kitchen, pilfering snacks and learning the secrets of cooking a good meal.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Brawler.title: brawler
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Brawler.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was quick to anger and loved getting up close and personal, resolving arguments with {PAWN_gender ? his : her} fists. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} didn't make many friends, but {PAWN_gender ? he : she} did get a lot of practice patching up wounds.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_MadProdogy.title: mad prodigy
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_MadProdogy.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was an unstable prodigy. He applied his genius to the arts, and frequently broke under the pressure of his chaotic mind.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Bully.title: bully
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Bully.description: {PAWN_nameDef} enjoyed hurting people, often picking on the smaller children. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} loved utterly crushing {PAWN_gender ? his : her} unfortunate targets.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_HappyGoLucky.title: sheltered child
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_HappyGoLucky.description: {PAWN_nameDef} had a sheltered childhood. {PAWN_gender ? His : Her} childhood had little strife, and {PAWN_gender ? he : she} spent {PAWN_gender ? his : her} time daydreaming and drawing.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Bookworm.title: bookworm
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Bookworm.description: {PAWN_nameDef}'s parents started a small colony on a remote planet, so as a small child there wasn't much to do except read a ton of books. Now {PAWN_nameDef} loves book so much that {PAWN_gender ? he : she} can't imagine doing without.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ReluctantBookworm.title: reluctant bookworm
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ReluctantBookworm.description: {PAWN_nameDef}'s parents started a small colony on a remote planet, so as a small child there wasn't much to do except read a ton of books. {PAWN_nameDef} read so many books that now {PAWN_gender ? he : she} can barely stand the sight of one, much preferring to spend time outdoors.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_AspiringChef.title: aspiring chef
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_AspiringChef.description: {PAWN_nameDef} grew up reading all sorts of book, but {PAWN_gender ? his : her} favorites were always cookbooks. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} learned everything {PAWN_gender ? he : she} could about recipes and ingredients from all over the world. {PAWN_nameDef} dreamed of one day opening {PAWN_gender ? his : her} own restaurant and writing books filled with all {PAWN_gender ? his : her} best recipes.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ScarredVeteran.title: scarred veteran
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ScarredVeteran.description: {PAWN_nameDef} reached adulthood with {PAWN_gender ? his : her} mind intact, but not {PAWN_gender ? his : her} body.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribalChild.title: tribal child
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildWarrior.title: child warrior
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildWarrior.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was exposed to the harsh realities of battle at a young age. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} is skilled in combat, but the trauma has stunted {PAWN_gender ? his : her} social skills.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildArcher.title: archer
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildArcher.description: {PAWN_nameDef} grew up practicing with bows and other ranged weapons.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildWarrior2.title: child warrior
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildWarrior2.description: {PAWN_nameDef} grew up on the battlefield, defending his tribe and vanquishing their enemies. All {PAWN_gender ? he : she} knows is combat.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ShamanApprentice.title: shaman's apprentice
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ShamanApprentice.description: {PAWN_nameDef} learned to care for all living things - including doing what's necessary to maintain the balance.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribalHunter.title: tribal hunter
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribalHunter.description: {PAWN_nameDef} wasn't very skilled with a bow, but {PAWN_gender ? he : she} still managed to successfully hunt, helping feed {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Gatherer.title: gatherer
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Gatherer.description: {PAWN_nameDef} gathered roots and berries to help feed {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Storyteller.title: storyteller
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Storyteller.description: {PAWN_nameDef} loved telling stories, inventing new worlds with {PAWN_gender ? his : her} imagination and enthralling her peers around the campfire. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} frequently used this talent to get out of doing chores.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TunnelKid2.title: tunnel kid
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TunnelKid2.description: {PAWN_nameDef} spent much of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} childhood underground, helping to expand {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe's caves. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} loved the work, and rarely went outside or saw the sun.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribalArtist.title: artist
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribalArtist.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was fascinated by colors and shapes. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} spent much of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} childhood drawing on every available surface, or planning out {PAWN_gender ? his : her} next creation.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribalCrafter.title: crafter
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribalCrafter.description: {PAWN_nameDef} loved working with {PAWN_gender ? his : her} hands to create useful things. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} also learned everything {PAWN_gender ? he : she} could about gathering materials for {PAWN_gender ? his : her} crafts.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribalCook.title: cook
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribalCook.description: {PAWN_nameDef} spent {PAWN_gender ? his : her} time in the kitchen, helping to feed {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe and occasionally stealing snacks.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribalBuilder.title: builder
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribalBuilder.description: {PAWN_nameDef} helped {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe with construction projects. {PAWN_gender ? His : Her} favourite part was using a hammer.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildShaman.title: child shaman
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildShaman.description: {PAWN_nameDef} grew up taking care of the sick and injured.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Healer.title: child healer
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Healer.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was a medical prodigy, caring for the sick and injured of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe and even performing surgery at a young age. Having seen so many injuries, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} abhors violence.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_AnimalWhisperer.title: animal whisperer
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_AnimalWhisperer.description: {PAWN_nameDef} took care of the colony's animals, tending to their neesd and persuading them to share their resources with {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildLaborerTribal.title: child laborer
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ChildLaborerTribal.description: {PAWN_nameDef} worked manual jobs around the settlement, building furniture and doing basic crafts.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribalArtist2.title: artist
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribalArtist2.description: {PAWN_nameDef} loved art from a young age, spending hours drawing on the floor and painting with traditional dyes. However, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} never learned to use {PAWN_gender ? his : her} skills in a practical way.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribalLookout.title: lookout
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribalLookout.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was assigned to watch over the animal herds when young, and keep an eye out for predators. As {PAWN_gender ? he : she} got older, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} would chase the predators away with a bow.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_FoodThief.title: food thief
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_FoodThief.description: {PAWN_nameDef} loved to eat, often getting into trouble for stealing more of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} share of the tribe's food. As punishment {PAWN_gender ? he : she} was put to work in the kitchens, where {PAWN_gender ? he : she} learned to love the art of cooking.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Ascetic.title: ascetic child
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Ascetic.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was never interested in furniture with ostantatious filigree or fancy, gluttonous meals. However, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} could still appreciate good craftsmanship when it counted.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribalBrawler.title: brawler
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribalBrawler.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was good in a fight, always training to be stronger. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} learned to shrug off hits that would have a lesser fighter on the ground.\n\Adds trait: Tough
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Scavenger.title: scavenger
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Scavenger.description: {PAWN_nameDef} spent {PAWN_gender ? his : her} childhood learning as much as {PAWN_gender ? he : she} could about everything, making {PAWN_gender ? him : her} a bit eccentric to the rest of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} was especially interested in disassembling old mechs to see how they are made, with the hope of advancing technology for {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TorturedArchitect.title: tortured architect
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TorturedArchitect.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was tortured by visions of architectural grandeur that his tribe could never live up to.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Barbarian.title: barbarian
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Barbarian.description: {PAWN_nameDef} enjoyed hurting people, often getting into fights. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} loved utterly crushing {PAWN_gender ? his : her} unfortunate targets.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribeOrphan.title: orphan
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribeOrphan.description: Growing up an orphan in a small tribe, {PAWN_nameDef} loved proving {PAWN_gender ? him : her}self in a fight. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} also learned the basics of gathering edible plants and cooking them into delicious meals, so that {PAWN_gender ? he : she} would never go hungry again.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribeOrphan2.title: orphan
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribeOrphan2.description: {PAWN_nameDef} lost {PAWN_gender ? his : her} parents at a young age. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} found solace caring for the livestock and other animals of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_HappyGoLucky2.title: happy go lucky
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_HappyGoLucky2.description: {PAWN_nameDef} had a peaceful childhood, shielded from hardship by {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe. {PAWN_gender ? His : Her} childhood had little strife, and {PAWN_gender ? he : she} spent {PAWN_gender ? his : her} time daydreaming and drawing.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribalDreamer.title: dreamer
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribalDreamer.description: Always running off to watch the clouds, {PAWN_nameDef} spent hardly any time at home. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} never learned how to interact with people, but whenever forced to do chores would come up with ways to do them faster than anyone else.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_AnimalTrainer.title: animal trainer
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_AnimalTrainer.description: {PAWN_nameDef} has a way with animals, and has been training them since the moment {PAWN_gender ? he : she} was old enough. Why carry firewood when a dog can do it for you?
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribalBookworm.title: tribal bookworm
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TribalBookworm.description: Despite growing up in a primitive tribe, {PAWN_nameDef} spent as much of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} time reading as possible. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} loved getting lost in the worlds of stories, and dreaming about what might be.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_BuddingAdventurer.title: budding adventurer
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_BuddingAdventurer.description: {PAWN_nameDef} grew up reading all sorts of adventure stories. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} dreamed of one day going on {PAWN_gender ? his : her} own adventures, and writing bestselling books of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} exploits.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Experimenter.title: experimenter
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Experimenter.description: {PAWN_nameDef} loved to learn, but had little access to books. Instead, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} turned {PAWN_gender ? his : her} attention to practical experiments.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ScarredVeteranTribal.title: scarred veteran
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_ScarredVeteranTribal.description: {PAWN_nameDef} fought to protect {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe, sustaining permenant injuries that plagued {PAWN_gender ? him : her} into adulthood.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TunnelKid.title: tunnel kid
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_TunnelKid.description: {PAWN_nameDef} spent much of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} time underground, working in the mines. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} loved every minute of it.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_UglyChild.title: ugly child
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_UglyChild.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was quite an ugly child. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} worked extra hard to make friends.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_UglyChild2.title: staggeringly ugly child
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_UglyChild2.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was a staggeringly ugly child. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} worked extra hard to make friends, baking treats for the rest of the colony to win favor.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Undergrounder.title: tunnel kid
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Undergrounder.description: {PAWN_nameDef} loved exploring and expanding the tunnels that extended from his home. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} enjoyed any kind of digging, even helping plow and till {PAWN_gender ? his : her} colony's farms.
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Assassin.title: assassin
LanguageData.UB_ZCB_Assassin.description: {PAWN_nameDef} loved watching {PAWN_gender ? his : her} enemies die through a scope. Or {PAWN_gender ? his : her} friends, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} wasn't picky.
